name: LLM-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Audio-Visual Speech Enhancement

description: arXiv:2603.13952v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In existing Audio-Visual Speech Enhancement (AVSE) methods, objectives such as Scale-Invariant Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SI-SNR) and Mean Squared Error (MSE) are widely used; however, their correlation with perceived speech quality is often suboptimal and provides limited interpretability for optimization. This work proposes a reinforcement...
author: Chih-Ning Chen, Jen-Cheng Hou, Hsin-Min Wang, Shao-Yi Chien, Yu Tsao, Fan-Gang Zeng
